languages.text: "Мои намерения проистекают из догм моего ордена, а догмы моего ордена воспрещают мне распространяться о своих замыслах посторонним, если это не принесет пользы делу". {n}Зораэль умолкает и окидывает вас многозначительным взглядом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Мои намерения проистекают из догм моего ордена, а догмы моего ордена воспрещают мне распространяться о своих замыслах посторонним, если это не принесет пользы делу". {n}Зораэль умолкает и окидывает вас многозначительным взглядом.{/n}
traits.speaker: Blood_Raven

languages.text: "My intentions follow the dogmas of my order, and the dogmas of my order forbid me from divulging my plans to outsiders unless doing so would serve the cause." {n}Zorael falls silent and fixes you with a meaningful gaze.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Мои намерения проистекают из догм моего ордена, а догмы моего ордена воспрещают мне распространяться о своих замыслах посторонним, если это не принесет пользы делу". {n}Зораэль умолкает и окидывает вас многозначительным взглядом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "My intentions flow from the dogmas of my order, and the dogmas of my order forbid me from divulging my designs to outsiders unless doing so would serve the cause." {n}Zorael falls silent and fixes you with a meaningful gaze.{/n}

"My intentions follow the dogmas of my order, and the dogmas of my order forbid me from divulging my plans to outsiders unless doing so would serve the cause." {n}Zorael falls silent and fixes you with a meaningful gaze.{/n}
"I will throw all my energy into finding my brothers, dead or alive."
"I will carry on with my duty. Every xenos in this den must be put to death."
"I will carry on with my duty. Every xenos in this den must be put to death."

"My intentions flow from the dogmas of my order, and the dogmas of my order forbid me from divulging my designs to outsiders unless doing so would serve the cause." {n}Zorael falls silent and fixes you with a meaningful gaze.{/n}

"My intentions follow the dogmas of my order, and the dogmas of my order forbid me from divulging my plans to outsiders unless doing so would serve the cause." {n}Zorael falls silent and fixes you with a meaningful gaze.{/n}

languages.text: 「生きていても死んでいても、兄弟を見つけ出すために、私は全力を尽くす」
languages.original_text: "I will throw all my energy into finding my brothers, dead or alive."

traits.locale_text: 「生きていても死んでいても、兄弟を見つけ出すために、私は全力を尽くす」

languages.text: «Mis intenciones siguen los dogmas de mi orden, que me prohíben divulgar mis planes a nadie que esté fuera de la orden salvo que al hacerlo contribuya a mi causa». {n}Zorael guarda silencio y te lanza una mirada cargada de significado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "My intentions follow the dogmas of my order, and the dogmas of my order forbid me from divulging my plans to outsiders unless doing so would serve the cause." {n}Zorael falls silent and fixes you with a meaningful gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Mis intenciones siguen los dogmas de mi orden, que me prohíben divulgar mis planes a nadie que esté fuera de la orden salvo que al hacerlo contribuya a mi causa». {n}Zorael guarda silencio y te lanza una mirada cargada de significado.{/n}

languages.text: "Meine Absichten folgen den Dogmen meines Ordens, die mir verbieten, meine Pläne mit Fremden zu teilen, sofern dies nicht der Sache dient." {n}Zorael verstummt und wirft dir einen bedeutungsvollen Blick zu.{/n}
languages.original_text: "My intentions follow the dogmas of my order, and the dogmas of my order forbid me from divulging my plans to outsiders unless doing so would serve the cause." {n}Zorael falls silent and fixes you with a meaningful gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Meine Absichten folgen den Dogmen meines Ordens, die mir verbieten, meine Pläne mit Fremden zu teilen, sofern dies nicht der Sache dient." {n}Zorael verstummt und wirft dir einen bedeutungsvollen Blick zu.{/n}

languages.text: « Mes intentions sont conformes aux dogmes de mon ordre, et les dogmes de mon ordre m'interdisent de divulguer mes plans à des étrangers, sauf si cela peut servir la cause. » {n}Zorael s'interrompt un instant en vous fixant d'un regard éloquent.{/n}
languages.original_text: "My intentions follow the dogmas of my order, and the dogmas of my order forbid me from divulging my plans to outsiders unless doing so would serve the cause." {n}Zorael falls silent and fixes you with a meaningful gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Mes intentions sont conformes aux dogmes de mon ordre, et les dogmes de mon ordre m'interdisent de divulguer mes plans à des étrangers, sauf si cela peut servir la cause. » {n}Zorael s'interrompt un instant en vous fixant d'un regard éloquent.{/n}

languages.text: “我的行动需遵循战团戒律，而战团戒律禁止我向外人透露计划，除非这样做有助于达成使命。”{n}佐拉尔沉默下来，意味深长地凝视着你。{/n}
languages.original_text: "My intentions follow the dogmas of my order, and the dogmas of my order forbid me from divulging my plans to outsiders unless doing so would serve the cause." {n}Zorael falls silent and fixes you with a meaningful gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我的行动需遵循战团戒律，而战团戒律禁止我向外人透露计划，除非这样做有助于达成使命。”{n}佐拉尔沉默下来，意味深长地凝视着你。{/n}

languages.text: "Niyetlerim tarikatımın dogmalarını takip eder ve tarikatımın dogmaları, davaya hizmet etmediği sürece planlarımı yabancılara açıklamamı yasaklar." {n}Zorael susuyor ve anlamlı bir bakışla gözlerini sana dikiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "My intentions follow the dogmas of my order, and the dogmas of my order forbid me from divulging my plans to outsiders unless doing so would serve the cause." {n}Zorael falls silent and fixes you with a meaningful gaze.{/n}
